creator: alexander@wittig.name
text:
(In reply to Alfonso S. Siciliano from comment #6)

Thanks Alfonso! It's not my invention, I "inherited" the project some 6 or 7 years ago, when I submitted a patch to update it to pkgng and the original maintainer/author wasn't available any more.

I used to run this in a local SVN repository, but I now imported it to GitHub: https://github.com/abgandar/pkg_rmleaves
Any comments and suggestions are very welcome!
